OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Fetches assessment responses for an individual application and sends the data to appropriate DataMappers to upsert records.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: UpsertRecordsForCoC

omniProcessElements.name: DeterminEligibleBenefitAmount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "=%RecordId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "disableChainable" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "FetchIAApplicationType:ApplicationType!=\"Recertification\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "integrationProcedureKey" : "ChangeOfCircumstances_DetermineEligibleBenefitAmount", "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: RemovePartyIncomeRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "HouseholdIncomeDetails" : "%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "RemovedPartyIncomeId" : "%PSSCoCDeletePartyIncomeRecords:PartyIncome_1:Id%" }, "bundle" : "PSSCoCDeletePartyIncomeRecords1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:ActionType==\"Remove\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction6", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: BenefitEligibilityExpressionSetAction
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "ExpressionSetAction1", "remoteClass" : "devopsimpkg11.PricingMatrixCalculationService", "remoteMethod" : "calculate", "remoteOptions" : { "actionContextCode" : "%RecordId%", "configurationName" : "PSSExpCloud_MemberBenefitEligibility", "explainabilitySpecName" : "BenefitApplicationLogs" }, "responseJSONNode" : "BenefitEligibilityStatus", "responseJSONPath" : "output:calculationResults:BenefitEligibilityStatus", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "input", "sendJSONPath" : "SetValuesForBenefitEligibilityExpressionSet", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: FetchACRForHouseholdMember
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "HouseholdMemberDetails" : "%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "AccountContactRelation" : "%FetchACRForHouseholdMember:AccountContactRelation%" }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchACRforHouseholdMember1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Remove\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction5", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: CreateDocumentChecklistItemForIncome
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentDocumentId" : "=%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:IncomeProofDocumentId%", "IndividualApplicationId" : "=%CreateNewPartyIncomeRecord:PartyIncomeId%", "Name" : "=%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:IncomeProofDocumentName%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSExpCloudNewDocumentChecklistItem1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:IncomeProofDocumentName)", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction11", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: CreateNewPartyIncomeRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "CalendarYear" : "=%IncomeData:CalendarYear%", "Employer" : "=%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=%IncomeData:EndDate%", "IncomeAmount" : "=%IncomeData:IncomeAmount%", "IncomeFrequency" : "=%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:IncomeFrequency%", "IncomeStatus" : "Active", "IncomeType" : "Salary", "PartyId" : "=%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:AccountId%", "StartDate" : "=%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:StartDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "PartyIncomeId" : "%CreateNewPartyIncomeRecord:PartyIncome_1:Id%" }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPartyIncome1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction10", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:AccountId%", "Employer" : "=%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=ADDDAY('4000-12-30', 1)" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchExistingPartyIncome1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction8", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: IfFrequencyMonthlyWhenIncomeSameForAllThreePeriods
IfFrequencyWeeklyWhenIncomeSameForAllThreePeriods
IfFrequencyYearlyWhenIncomeSameForAllThreePeriods
EndDatePreviousPartyIncomeRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "CalendarYear" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:CalendarYear%", "Employer" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=ADDDAY(%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:StartDate%, -1)", "IncomeAmount" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeAmount%", "IncomeFrequency" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeFrequency%", "IncomeStatus" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeStatus%", "IncomeType" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeType%", "PartyId" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:PartyId%", "PartyIncomeId" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:PartyIncomeId%", "StartDate" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:StartDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPartyIncome1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction8", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: LoopPreviousPartyIncomeRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records != \"null\"", "label" : "LoopBlock4", "loopList" : "FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records", "loopOutput" : { }, "show" : null }

childElements.name: IfSameHouseholdIncomeMember
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(SetMemberDetails:HouseholdMemberName == PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:IncomeHouseholdMemberName) && (((PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:ActionType==\"None\") && (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:PartyIncomeId==\"Add\")) || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:ActionType==\"Update\")) && (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails:IncomeCurrentMonth!=0)", "isIfElseBlock" : false, "label" : "ConditionalBlock1", "show" : null }

childElements.name: LoopHouseholdIncomeDetailsForAdd
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "LoopBlock3", "loopList" : "PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails", "loopOutput" : { }, "show" : null }

childElements.name: PSSFetchPersonDisability
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:AccountId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchPersonDisability1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Add\") || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Update\")", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: PSSGetContactIDFromPersonAccount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:AccountId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "ContactId" : "=%PSSGetContactIDFromPersonAccount:ContactId%" }, "bundle" : "PSSGetContactIDFromPersonAccount1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Add\") || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Update\")", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction4", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: PSSUpsertAccountContactRelation
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "BusinessAccountId" : "=%FetchHouseholdAccountId:BusinessAccountId%", "ContactId" : "=%PSSGetContactIDFromPersonAccount:ContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertAccountContactRelation1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Add\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction5", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: PSSUpsertContactProfile
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContactId" : "%PSSGetContactIDFromPersonAccount:ContactId%", "HouseholdMemberDetails" : "%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertContactProfile1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Add\") || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Update\")", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: PSSUpsertPersonDisability
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:AccountId%", "HouseholdMemberDetails" : "%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails%", "StartDate" : "%PSSFetchApplicationSubmissionDate:IACreationDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPersonDisability1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:IsDisabled==\"Yes\") &&\n(PSSFetchPersonDisability:PersonDisablity==\"null\") && ((PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Add\") || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Update\"))", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "BenefitEligibilityStatus" : "%BenefitEligibilityStatus%", "HouseholdMemberDetails" : "%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails%", "PhoneNumber" : "%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HeadOfHouseholdPhoneNumber%", "RecordId" : "%RecordId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "AccountId" : "%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:Account_1:Id%", "PublicApplicationParticipant" : "%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:PublicApplicationParticipant_2:Id%" }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertAccountAndPublicApplicationParticipant1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"None\") || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Add\") || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Update\")", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: RemoveACRRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "RecordId" : "%FetchACRForHouseholdMember:AccountContactRelation%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "RemovedAccountContactRelationId" : "=%PSSRemoveMember:AccountContactRelation_1:Id%" }, "bundle" : "PSSRemoveMember1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Remove\" && ISNOTBLANK(%FetchACRForHouseholdMember:AccountContactRelation%)", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction4", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: SetHeadOfHouseHoldAccountId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "HeadOfHouseHoldAccountId" : "=%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:AccountId%" }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:Relationship==\"Self\") && ((PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Add\") || (PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:ActionType==\"Update\"))", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

childElements.name: SetMemberDetails
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "HouseholdMemberName" : "=CONCAT(%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:HouseholdMemberFirstName%, ' ', %PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:HouseholdMemberLastName%)", "IncomeHouseholdMemberNameIndex" : 0 }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

childElements.name: SetValuesForBenefitEligibilityExpressionSet
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "USCitizen" : "=%PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:USCitizen%" }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSUpsertRecertBADueDate

omniProcessElements.name: UpdateApplicationStatus
